name: Ham Hocks and Lima Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the lima beans overnight and drain.
2. Place the beans in the bottom of a crock pot.
3. Add the remaining ingredients with 1 1/2 quarts of water.
4. Cover and cook on high for 2 hours.
5. Turn the heat to low and cook, covered, for 10 to 12 hours until tender.
